title: The Reasons for al-Rashid's Exacting Allegiance to Muhammad al-Amin as Heir
description: to Muhammad al-Amin as Heir 16m] According to what Rawh, the mawli of al-Fail b. Yahyi b. Khalid has mentioned, the reason behind this was that he had noted that 'Isa b. Ja'far had gone along to al-Fads b. Yahya and had said to him, "I adjure you by God to work427 for allegiance to be given to my sister's son"-he meant Muhammad b. Zubaydah bt. Ja'far b. alMan$ur-"for he is in effect a child of yours and his caliphate will be in effect your rule." Al-Fa4l promised him that he would do that.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
